title: Believe in your self no matter what
html:
Title-only one-line aphorism from late October 2021 by Yahir: "Believe in your self no matter what." Same-day companion to 2021 10 28 you can try it might work it might not thats just luck. Sits in the manifesto style note cluster.

yahir gonzalez · manifesto style note · fear of not doing

related.label: You can try, it might work it might not, that's just luck
